title: How Y Combinator's CEO ACTUALLY Uses Claude Code
summary: Austin Marchese analyzes Garry Tan's use of Claude Code to ship 600,000 lines of code in 60 days, breaking down four key strategies including role assignment, parallel sessions, custom tools, and upfront planning. One strategy is noted as controversial online while another is highlighted as transformative.
